briefing.headline: Earth Bridge Alliance advances into registration execution while JasperOS completes its Next.js transition and enters executive product implementation.
briefing.summary: The executive portfolio has transitioned from foundation construction into controlled execution. Earth Bridge Alliance founding work is complete and the organization is moving through legal registration execution. Vinyiabtumayokan remains strategically advanced but requires stronger coordination cadence with Johan and remaining external confirmations. JasperOS has completed its migration from Astro to Next.js while preserving ExecutiveStateProtocol v3.0.0 as the immutable executive contract. The development environment has matured through a dedicated Ubuntu VM with Code Server and OpenCode, establishing the execution workflow for JasperOS and future CompanyOS development.
briefing.today_focus: Advance Earth Bridge Alliance registration execution, complete JasperOS Executive Cockpit implementation on Next.js, and continue strengthening the executive development workflow through VM-based operations.

strategic_priorities.title: Launch Vinyiabtumayokan
strategic_priorities.next_action: Establish recurring coordination meetings with Johan, resolve Guillaume dependencies, and prepare campaign execution.

strategic_priorities.title: Complete Earth Bridge Alliance Registration
strategic_priorities.next_action: Submit incorporation documents through official government registration services.

strategic_priorities.title: Implement JasperOS
strategic_priorities.next_action: Complete Executive Cockpit interfaces and connect remaining ExecutiveStateProtocol domains.

strategic_priorities.title: Develop CompanyOS
strategic_priorities.next_action: Capture validated executive workflows from JasperOS.

strategic_priorities.title: AI Consulting & Products
strategic_priorities.next_action: Resume after current strategic priorities stabilize.

decisions.title: Freeze ExecutiveStateProtocol v3.0
decisions.reasoning: Establish a stable canonical API between Executive Office, JasperOS and CompanyOS.
decisions.impact: Future briefings become machine-readable and backward compatible.

decisions.title: Separate Decision Layer from Execution Layer
decisions.reasoning: Executive Office owns decisions while project spaces own implementation.
decisions.impact: Improves focus and prevents project clutter.

decisions.title: Waiting On Register
decisions.reasoning: Executives manage dependencies, not only tasks.

decisions.title: Transition Earth Bridge Alliance from Founding Phase to Registration Execution
decisions.reasoning: Signed founding PDFs were received. The founding process is complete and should remain frozen while legal registration proceeds.
decisions.impact: Removes founding uncertainty and shifts management focus toward institutional execution.

decisions.title: Establish Recurring Coordination Meetings with Johan
decisions.reasoning: Communication cadence with Johan is insufficient. Weekly meetings during active setup phase, biweekly once stabilized.
decisions.impact: Improves Colombia operational coordination and resolves structural dependency.

decisions.title: Separate Executive State Storage from Executive State Contract
decisions.reasoning: ExecutiveStateProtocol v3.0.0 remains immutable while internal implementation evolves toward modular domain providers.
decisions.impact: JasperOS architecture can evolve without breaking the executive interface.

decisions.title: Adopt Domain-Based State Providers for JasperOS
decisions.reasoning: Executive state should be generated from domain-owned sources rather than maintained manually in one large state file.
decisions.impact: Creates a foundation for future API-driven executive state generation.

decisions.title: Maintain Append-Only Executive History
decisions.reasoning: Tasks, decisions, dependencies, risks and completed work represent institutional memory and must remain preserved.
decisions.impact: Future briefings represent state evolution rather than rewritten snapshots.

decisions.title: Complete JasperOS Migration to Next.js
decisions.reasoning: Next.js provides the production-ready application foundation for JasperOS while preserving ExecutiveStateProtocol compatibility and domain-based architecture.
decisions.impact: JasperOS moves from framework migration into executive product implementation.

decisions.title: Establish VM-Based AI Development Workflow
decisions.reasoning: A dedicated Ubuntu VM with Code Server and OpenCode creates a controlled environment for AI-assisted development and repository execution.
decisions.impact: Creates a repeatable engineering workflow for JasperOS and future CompanyOS development.

waiting_on_register.dependency: Submission and processing of Earth Bridge Alliance incorporation documents
Confirmation and Kamëntsá artisan photos and European inventory
Recurring coordination meeting cadence and Colombia reporting structure

executive_actions.title: Submit Earth Bridge Alliance registration documents
executive_actions.reason: Founding phase completed and institutional execution started.

executive_actions.title: Complete JasperOS Executive Cockpit implementation
executive_actions.reason: Migration to Next.js completed. Focus shifts to executive feature completion.

daily.status: Earth Bridge Alliance remains in registration execution. JasperOS completed Next.js migration and entered executive product implementation while ExecutiveStateProtocol v3.0.0 remains immutable.
